subcodes.first_line: We turned Our hearing unto the realms of the Alif, whereupon We heard the mournful cawing of the raven of tyranny and the croaking of him who hath arisen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا توجهنا بسمعنا الی ممالک الالف سمعنا نعیب غراب الظلم و نعیق من قام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God
